apple_mapper_url.description:
AppleMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses Apple's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

auth0_mapper_url.description:
Auth0Mapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses Auth0's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

created_at.description: The onboarding portal link's creation date

enable_scim.description: Feature flag to enable SCIM configuration

enable_sso.description: Feature flag to enable SSO configuration

expires_at.description: The onboarding portal link's expiry date

facebook_mapper_url.description:
FacebookMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses Facebook's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

generic_oidc_mapper_url.description:
GenericOIDCMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses the OIDC Provider's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

github_mapper_url.description:
GithubMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses GitHub's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

gitlab_mapper_url.description:
GitLabMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses GitLab's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

google_mapper_url.description:
GoogleMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses Google's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

microsoft_mapper_url.description:
MicrosoftMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses Microsoft's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

netid_mapper_url.description:
NetIDMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses NetID's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

organization_id.description: The onboarding portal link's organization ID

project_id.description: The onboarding portal link's project ID

proxy_acs_url.description: Proxy ACS URL if overriding with a customer-controlled URL

proxy_oidc_redirect_url.description: Proxy OIDC Redirect URL if overriding with a customer-controlled URL

proxy_saml_audience_override.description: SAML Audience Override if overriding with a customer-controlled one

proxy_scim_server_url.description: Proxy SCIM Server URL if overriding with a customer-controlled URL

saml_mapper_url.description:
SAMLMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses the SAML Provider's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

scim_mapper_url.description:
SCIMMapper specifies the JSONNet code snippet which uses the SCIM Provider's
profile information to hydrate the identity's data.

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).

schema.title: JSON API Error Response
